description: Create the complete msp.html page in /pages/ with MSP product content in question format, premium tables, error-free premium calculator using lookup table approach, keyword highlighting, and full styling following existing page patterns (mpds.html, mdwa.html, miuhc.html).
steps: Create /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/msp.html following the same HTML structure as pages like mpds.html and mdwa.html: DOCTYPE, head with meta/title/description, link to /assets/style.css, dark mode init script, page-specific <style> block.

Add page-specific CSS variables (--msp-green, --msp-dark, --msp-light) and custom styles for .msp-hero, .msp-badge, .msp-stat-grid, .msp-stat, advantage cards, calculator, tables, FAQ, and keyword highlighting classes (.kw-blue, .kw-gold, .kw-green, .kw-orange). Colors must NOT clash with each other - use harmonious palette.
Add div#site-header and div#site-footer containers that are populated by main.js component loader. Add breadcrumb navigation.

Create the HERO section with question-format headline (e.g., 'Bagaimana jika ada produk yang memberikan proteksi sekaligus pengembalian premi 500%?') using .page-hero pattern. Include stats grid (500% return, 5 tahun bayar, Guaranteed).

Create product introduction section with content in bahasa pertanyaan format describing MSP product. Use keyword highlighting (.kw, .kw-cta, .kw-gold, custom classes) to make important terms stand out. Content covers: what MSP is, how it works, GIO, eligibility, use cases (dana pendidikan, pensiun, warisan).

Create benefits/manfaat section describing: (1) Manfaat Pembayaran Tunai Tahunan with IDR and USD rates tables, (2) Manfaat Akhir Masa Pertanggungan (500%), (3) Manfaat Meninggal Dunia with proportional scale. Include comparison tables showing total benefits vs premiums for each term.

Create PREMIUM TABLES section with well-formatted responsive tables showing: minimum premi per mode (Tahunan/Semesteran/Kuartalan/Bulanan) for IDR and USD, modal faktor, and benefit comparison by masa pertanggungan (10/15/20 tahun).

Create the PREMIUM CALCULATOR section using lookup table approach (NOT mathematical formulas). Inputs: Mata Uang (IDR/USD), Masa Pertanggungan (10/15/20), Mode Pembayaran (Tahunan/Semesteran/Kuartalan/Bulanan), Premi amount. The calculator must: (a) validate minimum premi per mode and currency, (b) convert to annual equivalent using modal_faktor, (c) compute Total Premi Terbayar = Premi Tahunan * 5, (d) compute Manfaat Akhir = 500% * Premi Tahunan, (e) compute Manfaat Tunai Tahunan using lookup rates, (f) compute Total Manfaat Hidup, (g) compute Manfaat Meninggal (sebab alami + kecelakaan) with ADB cap of Rp600jt/USD60k, (h) show year-by-year table. Use the exact lookup data provided in the task spec JSON.
Implement Death During Premium Payment Period (Year 1-5) proportional logic in calculator: Year 1=20%, Year 2=40%, Year 3=60%, Year 4=80%, Year 5=100% of benefits (for annual mode).

Create FAQ section using the .faq-list/.faq-item/.faq-trigger/.faq-body pattern from main.js. Include questions covering: what is MSP, difference from unit link, minimum premi, late payment/grace period, surrender, guaranteed benefits, death benefit, claims procedure, GIO.
Create CTA section encouraging users to contact agent via WhatsApp.
Add script tag loading /assets/main.js at end of body to enable component loading, dark mode, FAQ accordion, scroll buttons, and search functionality.
Ensure all content is in Bahasa Indonesia and uses question-format (bahasa pertanyaan) to make users think about how valuable the product is.
acceptance_criteria: File /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/msp.html exists and is valid HTML
Page loads header and footer via div#site-header and div#site-footer with main.js
Page has page-specific <style> block with non-clashing color palette for keyword highlighting
Content is written in question format (bahasa pertanyaan) in Bahasa Indonesia
Premium tables for IDR and USD are present and accurate
Calculator uses lookup table data matching the provided JSON spec exactly
Calculator validates minimum premium per mode/currency
Calculator correctly computes: annual equivalent, total premi, manfaat tunai tahunan, manfaat akhir (500%), total manfaat hidup, manfaat meninggal (alami + kecelakaan), ADB cap enforcement
Calculator handles Year 1-5 death benefit proportional scale (20/40/60/80/100%)
FAQ accordion section present with relevant MSP questions
Dark mode support via html.dark CSS overrides
verification: Run: cat /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/msp.html | head -5 to confirm file exists
Run: grep -c 'site-header' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/msp.html to confirm header container exists
Run: grep -c 'site-footer' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/msp.html to confirm footer container exists
Run: grep -c 'main.js' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/msp.html to confirm main.js is loaded
Run: grep -c 'kw' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/msp.html to confirm keyword highlighting is used
Run: grep -c '12000000\|12.000.000' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/msp.html to confirm IDR minimum premi data is present
Run: grep -c '600000000\|600.000.000' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/msp.html to confirm ADB cap is present
Run: grep -c 'faq-item' /projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/msp.html to confirm FAQ section exists

Run: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('/projects/sandbox/Project-Cuan-3.0/pages/msp.html','utf8'); console.log('Lines:', html.split('\n').length); console.log('Has calculator:', html.includes('calculateMSP')); console.log('Has dark mode:', html.includes('html.dark'));" to validate key elements
